heading: Sunday
text: Sunshine mixing with clouds. Highs from the low to mid 50s north, into the upper 50s south. Wind becoming northwest at 10 to 15 mph.

heading: Sunday Night
text: Mostly clear, increasing cloud cover overnight, with a chance of rain showers north of Route 2 after midnight. Lows in the 30s, near 40 along Lake Champlain. Light and variable wind.

heading: Monday
text: Partly sunny in the morning, then clouds spreading east. A few scattered rain showers, highest chances north of Route 2. Highs in the 60s, with a few 50s sticking around in the northeast. Southwest wind 10 to 15 mph, gusting 20 to 25 mph.
